title: Allbusky 50PCS Gold Square Paper Candy Boxes, Sweet Wedding Favour Boxes, DIY Party Gift Bags, Paper Treat Box, Party Packs Parties Decorations
features: 💞【High Quality Paper Candy Boxes】:Our candy boxes are made of premium paper, safe and recyclable, strong and no smell. Blank paper box can be written some special words and DIY it as you want. Perfect for DIY party favors.

💞【Elegant Paper Favour Boxes】:Our elegant favour boxes for wedding favours and party favours, can hold sweet, confetti, candy, chocolate, small jewelry, and other gadget, or other special goodies you would like to present them to the guests.

💞【Creative Paper Party Packs】:Our sweet candy boxes with solid color design are very concise which can be used as wedding table holder, wedding table decoration, party table decoration; also can be part of guest keepsake. Our DIY party packs would give you a stunning favor; Perfect for your wedding decorations.

💞【Party Gift Bags】:Ideal gift boxes for many kinds of parties as wedding, birthday, Christmas, christening, Holy communion, hen party, baby shower, Easter, Halloween, baptism, graduation, farewell party, etc.
💞【Package and Size】:Come with 50 pieces Paper Party Packss(with ribbons); Size: 7.5 x 7.5 x 7.5cm(L x W x H); Note: Supplied flat, can be assemble within seconds.

These favor gift bags are perfect for any occasions, like wedding, birthday party, engagement, anniversary and other special events.
